race.comment: GRATIFICATION (2) recorded his first win last start over 1710m at Ipswich, getting home by a head. Will have derived a stack of confidence from that victory and is nicely placed to double the win tally. SOMETHIN IN ORANGE (5) was always forward and boxed on to finish fifth over 1625m at this track last time. Should camp just off the leaders and is expected to be in the finish. HELL TO THE LINE (6) won at this circuit two starts ago but was below his best at a more recent appearance, finishing fifth over 1625m at this venue. Is usually thereabouts and has definite top-three prospects. HABERFIELD (9) is not out of this.
